meaning: n.斯瓦希里人[语]adj.班图人[语]的
examples: The very name of the Tanzanian port means “lay down your heart” in Swahili.
Mr Gration was born in Congo to missionary parents, speaks Swahili and knows the region well.
I was a bit worried, to say the least. The man next to me said in Swahili, "What's the problem?"
Most computer operating systems and software in Swahili-speaking areas are in English or French.
On his 2005 album, Ceasefire, Jal raps in four languages: Arabic, English, Swahili and Nuer.
